name: Marvel Icons Denim Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow - The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Add comfort and cool superhero style to your kid's bed or chair with the Marvel Icons Denim Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow from The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™. Made from recycled polyester denim fabric in blue, this throw pillow features allover Marvel icons for a fan-favorite look. A fun pairing with Marvel-themed sheets and pillowcases, the sewn-seam closures and red trim around the edges complete the look.
